title: custom_emoji_set and space_ban_set have no destroy-only path
description: custom_emoji.rs and space_ban.rs: custom_emoji_set and space_ban_set take a mandatory &CreateInput plus destroy: &[&str]. A caller that only wants to destroy an object must pass a synthetic create input. space_invite_set solves this by making input: Option<&...>; the other two do not, with no explanation of the asymmetry. Fix: either make the create input Option (matching space_invite_set) or add a doc note explaining why create is always required.
close_reason: decision: custom_emoji_set always creates (required input); destroy of arbitrary custom emojis is an uncommon admin operation not yet needed; add a separate destroy-only method when needed
